title: Why does wreduce remove $mux cells with 1'bx as input?

features.name: mux_cell_with_x_input
features.description: Code should include a $mux cell with 1'bx as one of its data inputs, created via a ternary expression like 's[1] ? 1'bx : ...'

features.name: mixed_assign_and_procedural
features.description: Code should include both continuous assignments (assign) and procedural assignments (always @*) for the same signal or related signals in a module
